name: The World of the Montclairs | Welcome To The Ton (Bridgerton Inspired)
description:
“Dearest Gentle Reader,

I must say that this season is going to be quite interesting.”

This is the “open world”, so to speak, for my Bridgerton inspired series. In this, you can be anyone of any status or gender and romance any of the characters in the series by creating your own plot. You get a starter, and then you’re free to run wild. This is because I’ll be taking a long break soon, so by doing things this way, you guys can have any scenario you want and I won’t have to make alts because I fear I burned myself out with this one. 💀 Idk if this series will even get much attention, but I still thought this was a fun idea and a way to explore characters that don’t have bots yet or might not at all.

As I post characters, I’ll link them all here.

Open World Bot (you are here)

Adrien

Sebastien
creator: lovesvoid
